simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  have h₁ : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have h₂ : 0 < ‖P‖ := by
      exact norm_pos_iff.mpr (show (P : ℝ³) ≠ 0 by
        -- Prove that P is not the zero vector
        have h₃ : P ∈ poly.vertices := by
          -- We need to show that P is in the vertices of the polygon.
          -- Since P is given as an arbitrary vertex of the polygon, we can directly use the hypothesis.
          have h₄ := pc.S_in_poly
          have h₅ := pc.w_unit
          have h₆ := pc.exceeds
          -- The actual proof would involve showing that P is in the vertices of the polygon.
          -- Here, we assume that P is indeed one of the vertices of the polygon.
          simp_all [GoodPoly]
          <;>
          aesop
        have h₄ : (P : ℝ³) ≠ 0 := by
          -- Since the polygon is good, none of its vertices are the origin.
          have h₅ : ∀ (v : ℝ³), v ∈ poly.vertices → v ≠ 0 := by
            intro v hv
            have h₆ := poly.nonneg v hv
            have h₇ := poly.not_origin v hv
            simp_all [norm_eq_abs]
            <;>
            aesop
          have h₆ : P ∈ poly.vertices := h₃
          have h₇ : P ≠ 0 := h₅ P h₆
          exact h₇
        exact h₄)
    linarith
  field_simp [h₁]
  <;> simp_all [inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, mul_assoc]
  <;>

have h₁ : pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams = ⟪pc.w, (1 / ‖P‖) • p.outer P⟫ := by
    simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
    <;>
    simp [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, LinearMap.coe_add, LinearMap.coe_smul,
      LinearMap.coe_one, LinearMap.coe_zero, LinearMap.coe_mul]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_nonneg]
    <;>
    simp_all [rotM, Matrix.dotProduct, LinearMap.coe_add, LinearMap.coe_smul]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [rotM, Matrix.dotProduct, LinearMap.coe_add, LinearMap.coe_smul]
    <;>
    field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_nonneg]
    <;>
    simp_all [rotM, Matrix.dotProduct, LinearMap.coe_add, LinearMap.coe_smul]
  rw [h₁]
  have h₂ : (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) • p.outer P = (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * p.outer P := by
    simp [smul_eq_mul]
  rw [h₂]
  have h₃ : ⟪pc.w, (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * p.outer P⟫ = (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
    simp [inner_smul_right]
  rw [h₃]
  have h₄ : (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ * ‖P‖ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
    by_cases h₅ : ‖P‖ = 0
    · have h₆ : P = 0 := by
        have h₇ : ‖P‖ = 0 → P = 0 := by
          intro h₇
          have h₈ : P = 0 := by
            simpa [norm_eq_zero] using h₇
          exact h₈
        exact h₇ h₅
      simp_all [h₆]
      <;>
      simp_all [inner, Matrix.dotProduct, LinearMap.coe_add, LinearMap.coe_smul]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      norm_num
    · field_simp [h₅]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      field_simp [h₅]
      <;>
      linarith
  calc
    ⟪pc.w, (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * p.outer P⟫ * ‖P‖ = ((1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫) * ‖P‖ := by rw [h₃]
    _ = (1 / ‖P‖ : ℝ) * ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ * ‖P‖ := by ring
    _ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by rw [h₄]

have h₀ : pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
    dsimp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
    <;> simp [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.cons_val_zero]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> simp_all [p.outerParams]
    <;> rfl
  rw [h₀]
  have h₁ : (p.outer : ℝ³ → ℝ³) = (rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ : ℝ³ → ℝ³) := by
    congr
    <;> rfl
  have h₂ : (p.outer : ℝ³ → ℝ³) P = (rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ : ℝ³ → ℝ³) P := by
    rw [h₁]
  have h₃ : (p.outerParams : Fin 2 → ℝ) 0 = p.θ₂ := by
    simp [p.outerParams]
    <;> simp_all [Fin.forall_fin_two]
    <;> rfl
  have h₄ : (p.outerParams : Fin 2 → ℝ) 1 = p.φ₂ := by
    simp [p.outerParams]
    <;> simp_all [Fin.forall_fin_two]
    <;> rfl
  have h₅ : (rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P : ℝ³) = (rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P : ℝ³) := by
    rw [h₃, h₄]
  have h₆ : ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ = ⟪rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P, pc.w⟫ := by
    rw [h₅]
  have h₇ : ⟪rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P, pc.w⟫ = ⟪p.outer P, pc.w⟫ := by
    calc
      _ = ⟪(rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ : ℝ³ → ℝ³) P, pc.w⟫ := rfl
      _ = ⟪p.outer P, pc.w⟫ := by
        rw [h₁]
        <;> simp [p.outer]
  calc
    (⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) * ‖P‖ = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ := by
      by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
      · simp_all [norm_eq_zero]
      · field_simp [h]
        <;> ring_nf
    _ = ⟪rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P, pc.w⟫ := by rw [h₆]
    _ = ⟪p.outer P, pc.w⟫ := by rw [h₇]
    _ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by rw [real_inner_comm]

have h_main : (pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams) * ‖P‖ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
    simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
    have h₁ : ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖ * ‖P‖ = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ := by
      have h₂ : ‖P‖ > 0 ∨ ‖P‖ = 0 := by by_cases h : ‖P‖ > 0 <;> [exact Or.inl h; exact Or.inr (by linarith)]
      cases h₂ with
      | inl h₂ =>
        field_simp [h₂.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
      | inr h₂ =>
        have h₃ : P = 0 := by
          simp [norm_eq_zero] at h₂ ⊢
          <;>
          (try cases P <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
          (try linarith)
        simp_all [h₃, inner_zero_right]
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
        (try linarith)
    have h₂ : ⟪p.outer P, pc.w⟫ = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ := by
      simp [p.outer, p.outerParams]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [InnerProductSpace.toReal_inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try linarith)
    calc
      (⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) * ‖P‖ = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ := by
        exact h₁
      _ = ⟪p.outer P, pc.w⟫ := by
        rw [h₂]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [InnerProductSpace.toReal_inner, Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
        (try linarith)
      _ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
        simp [real_inner_comm]
  exact h_main

have h₁ : pc.fu_outer P p = (⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ / ‖P‖) := by
    simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, inner]
    <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try field_simp) <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ])
  rw [h₁]

simp [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, inner_comm]
    <;>
    simp_all [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_pos, le_of_lt]
    <;>
    ring_nf at *
    <;>
    simp_all [inner_comm]
    <;>
    field_simp [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_pos, le_of_lt]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
  rw [h₀]
  by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
  · have h₁ : P = 0 := by
      rw [norm_eq_zero] at h
      exact h
    simp_all [h₁, inner_zero_left]
    <;>
    simp_all [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_pos, le_of_lt]
    <;>
    ring_nf at *
    <;>
    simp_all [inner_comm]
  · have h₁ : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := h
    field_simp [h₁]
    <;>
    simp_all [inner_comm]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    linarith

have h₀ : p.outer P = (rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1)) P := by
    simp [p.outer, p.outerParams, RotM]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [RotM, Matrix.ext_iff, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Finset.sum_range_succ, Finset.sum_range_zero])
    <;>
    (try norm_num)
    <;>
    (try aesop)
  
  -- Case distinction on whether P = 0
  by_cases h : P = 0
  · -- Case: P = 0
    have h₁ : ‖P‖ = 0 := by simp [h]
    simp [h, h₁, pc.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, h₀, real_inner_zero_right]
    <;>
    (try norm_num)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [h₀, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf)
    <;>
    (try aesop)
  · -- Case: P ≠ 0
    have h₁ : ‖P‖ ≠ 0 := by
      have h₂ : ‖P‖ > 0 := by
        apply norm_pos_iff.mpr
        exact h
      linarith
    have h₂ : pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖ := by
      simp only [pc.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
      <;>
      (try ring_nf)
      <;>
      (try simp_all [h₀, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt])
      <;>
      (try norm_num)
      <;>
      (try aesop)
    calc
      pc.fu_outer P p.outerParams * ‖P‖ = (⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) * ‖P‖ := by rw [h₂]
      _ = ⟪rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1) P, pc.w⟫ := by
        field_simp [h₁]
        <;>
        (try ring_nf)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [h₀, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt])
        <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try aesop)
      _ = ⟪pc.w, (rotM (p.outerParams 0) (p.outerParams 1)) P⟫ := by
        rw [real_inner_comm]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [h₀, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt])
        <;>
        (try ring_nf)
        <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try aesop)
      _ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
        rw [h₀]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [h₀, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt])
        <;>
        (try ring_nf)
        <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try aesop)
p.φ₂)

simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, div_eq_mul_inv]
  have h₁ : (rotM p.θ p.φ) = (p.outer.1) := by
    ext1 i
    simp [p, Matrix.of_apply, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons]
    <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith [p.θ, p.φ, p.α]) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith [p.θ, p.φ, p.α]) <;>
    (try ring_nf) <;>
    (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
    (try norm_num) <;>
    (try linarith [p.θ, p.φ, p.α])
  have h₂ : ‖(P : ℝ³)‖ ≠ 0 := by
    have h₃ : 0 < ‖(P : ℝ³)‖ := by
      positivity
    linarith
  have h₃ : ⟪(pc.w : ℝ²), (p.outer P)⟫ = ⟪(pc.w : ℝ²), (rotM p.θ p.φ) * P⟫ := by
    simp [p, LinearMap.comp_apply, h₁]
  simp_all [inner, mul_assoc]
  <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try field_simp [h₂]) <;>
  (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.mul_apply,
    Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try linarith [p.θ, p.φ, p.α])
  <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.mul_apply,
    Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try linarith [p.θ, p.φ, p.α])
  <;>
  (try ring_nf) <;>
  (try simp_all [Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val, Matrix.head_cons, Matrix.mul_apply,
    Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ]) <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try linarith [p.θ, p.φ, p.α])

simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, inner] at *
  simp_all [InnerProductSpace.norm_eq_abs]
  <;>
  (try norm_num) <;>
  (try field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul,
    abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs]) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try norm_cast at *) <;>
  (try simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero]) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      linarith
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul,
        abs_of_nonneg, Real.sqrt_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs] at *
      <;>
      simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      linarith
    })
  <;>
  aesop

simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, inner, Matrix.dotProduct]
  field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, norm_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> simp [inner, rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, Eqs]
  <;> norm_num
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [LinearMap, ContinuousLinearMap]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      field_simp [norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, norm_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp [inner, rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, Eqs]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [LinearMap, ContinuousLinearMap]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [Matrix.dotProduct, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      linarith
    })
m

simp only [GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  have h₁ : ⟪rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P, pc.w⟫ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
    simp [ inner_real_inner_comm, p.outer]
  have h₂ : ‖P‖ = ‖P‖ := rfl
  calc
    (⟪rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P, pc.w⟫ / ‖P‖) * ‖P‖ = ⟪rotM p.θ₂ p.φ₂ P, pc.w⟫ := by
      by_cases h : ‖P‖ = 0
      · have h₃ : P = 0 := by
          simpa [norm_eq_abs] using h
        simp [h₃, inner_zero_left]
        <;> simp_all [h]
        <;> field_simp [h]
        <;> ring
      · field_simp [h]
        <;> ring
    _ = ⟪pc.w, p.outer P⟫ := by
      rw [h₁]
  <;> simp_all [inner_real_inner_comm]
